IN.name: Indiana
IN.description: Explore Indiana's diverse state parks and forests featuring stunning waterfalls, scenic lakes, towering sand dunes, and hardwood forests.

parks.name: Indiana Dunes State Park
parks.description: Iconic park on Lake Michigan featuring towering sand dunes reaching 200 feet high. Offers 3 miles of pristine beaches, 16 miles of hiking trails.

parks.name: Brown County State Park
parks.description: Indiana's largest state park covering 15,776 acres of scenic hills and forests. Known as the 'Little Smokies' for stunning fall foliage.

parks.name: Turkey Run State Park
parks.description: Famous for spectacular sandstone gorges carved by Sugar Creek. Features stunning slot canyons, ladders through rock passages, and scenic suspension bridge.

CA.name: California
CA.description: From coastal redwoods to desert parks, California state parks offer world-class recreation and scenery.

parks.name: Big Sur State Park
parks.description: Spectacular coastal park with rugged cliffs, redwood groves, and the famous McWay Falls.
